summary: Frontend-only verification of attach_sample_pack UI in Governance > Outreach. All acceptance criteria met.
verified_flows: Admin login (admin@nexus.io / nexus123) -> nav-admin -> gov-tab-outreach opens Outreach Engine panel.
sample-pack-card visible; attach-sample-checkbox exists, default UNCHECKED. Label reads '... (off)'. Clicking toggles to CHECKED and label reads '... (ON)'.

With checkbox CHECKED, sandbox send (outreach-sandbox-email=test+attach@example.com, outreach-sandbox-send) issued POST /api/outreach/send with attach_sample_pack:true, response 200. outreach-msg: 'Sandbox test sent to test+attach@example.com (sample: Diendei, LLC).' No console errors.

Save settings (outreach-save) issued PUT /api/outreach/auto payload including attach_sample_pack:true -> 200; msg 'Auto-send settings saved.' After full page reload + re-navigating to Outreach tab, attach-sample-checkbox remained CHECKED (config round-trip OK).

Regression: sample-preview-btn returned 5 rows in the sample table; outreach-template dropdown selection filled subject ('10 AI-scored Tampa Bay leads for {{company}} (pilot)'); no JS console errors throughout.
seed_data_creation: Reset checkbox to unchecked and saved after testing to avoid lingering state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: attach_sample_pack UI + persistence verified end-to-end on cloud-saas-hub host. Payloads confirmed via request interception: POST /api/outreach/send and PUT /api/outreach/auto both include attach_sample_pack when checkbox toggled ON.
